name: ROI Calculator
description: Industrial-grade ROI calculator based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO standards for manufacturing and logistics operations.

inputs.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.

inputs.label: Operating Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.

inputs.label: Total Inventory Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.

inputs.label: Annual Direct Labor Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.

inputs.label: Lean Implementation Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

inputs.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in waste).

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of industrial operation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

inputs.label: ISO 9001 Certified
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality cost baselines.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Improvement factor must be between 0 and 1.
Annual revenue must be at least $100,000.
ISO 9001 certified facilities typically have defect rates below 3%. Please verify.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 10% - immediate quality improvement recommended.
Operating margin below 5% - cost reduction initiatives critical.
Inventory value exceeds 30% of annual revenue - potential excess inventory.

formulas.name: Quality Cost Savings
formulas.description: Annual savings from defect reduction based on Six Sigma principles.

formulas.name: Inventory Carrying Cost Savings
formulas.description: Reduction in inventory holding costs from Lean inventory reduction.

formulas.name: Labor Efficiency Savings
formulas.description: Labor cost reduction from process improvements (Lean).

formulas.name: Energy Savings
formulas.description: Energy cost reduction from Lean and Green initiatives.

formulas.name: Total Annual Benefit
formulas.description: Sum of all annual savings from improvements.

formulas.name: Net Present Value (NPV) - 5 Year
formulas.description: NPV of improvement investment over 5 years using 10% discount rate.

formulas.name: Return on Investment (ROI) %
formulas.description: Primary ROI metric as a percentage.

primary.label: Return on Investment (ROI)
primary.description: Overall ROI percentage over 5 years from Lean/Six Sigma implementation.

inventory_carrying_cost_savings.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Savings
inventory_carrying_cost_savings.description: Annual savings from reduced inventory holding costs.

labor_efficiency_savings.label: Labor Efficiency Savings
labor_efficiency_savings.description: Annual savings from improved labor productivity.

energy_savings.label: Energy Savings
energy_savings.description: Annual savings from energy efficiency improvements.

net_present_value.label: Net Present Value (5 Year)
net_present_value.description: NPV of the investment over 5 years at 10% discount rate.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excess Motion Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unnecessary movement of people or equipment, typical in non-Lean environments.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Overprocessing Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Doing more work than required by the customer (e.g., extra inspections).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waiting Time Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Idle time due to bottlenecks or unbalanced workflows.

suggestedActions.description: Implement 5S workplace organization to reduce motion and waiting waste.
Deploy Statistical Process Control (SPC) to reduce defect rates.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: 30-50% reduction in defect rate within 6 months.

suggestedActions.description: Conduct value stream mapping to identify and eliminate overprocessing.
Optimize inventory levels using Kanban systems.
Invest in energy-efficient equipment and lighting.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Confidence-Adjusted ROI
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: ROI adjusted for data uncertainty using a confidence factor of 0.85 (based on typical industrial data quality).
